name: mirofish
description: MiroFish - 簡潔通用的群體智能引擎，預測萬物

scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && python3.11 -m venv .venv && COPYFILE_DISABLE=1 .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements-local.txt
scripts.setup:backend:full: cd backend && python3.11 -m venv .venv && COPYFILE_DISABLE=1 .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup && npm run setup:backend
